data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. All four acceptance criteria verified. Multi-select loop in _collect_discovered_models correctly allows repeated model selection from one scan, suppresses already-chosen models, persists each as a separate REGISTERED_AGENTS entry with slugified IDs, and falls back to base CLI id on zero selection. Both setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh are in sync. KV helpers hardened for hyphenated ids. Unit tests cover multi-entry writer and zero-selection fallback. PTY smoke test selects two Copilot models and verifies persistence. No regressions to single-agent path. Bash 3.2 compatible.
